name: harmonize-dti-evals
title: Harmonize evals schema and add routing-negative cases
description: evals drift: ast-grep and goal-meta use an expectations key; archive-planning has neither assertions nor expectations; ast-grep and archive-planning have zero near-neighbor routing-negative cases. agents-md-improver, claude-md-improver, codex-workflow-recommender have no evals at all. Align schema and add >=2 routing-negative cases where evals exist.
creator: lyh
